items.title: Sherwin-Williams Completes Acquisition of BASF's Brazilian Architectural Paints Business
items.description: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE: SHW) has completed the acquisition of BASF's Brazilian architectural paints business ("Suvinil") following the announcement of a definitive agreement in February of this year and subsequent customary regulatory approvals.

items.title: The Sherwin-Williams Company’s (SHW) Consistency: What Makes it a Reliable Dividend Stock
items.description: The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) is included among the 12 Best Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Invest in Right Now. The Sherwin-Williams Company (NYSE:SHW) has one of the largest paint store networks in North America, which provides architectural paints, industrial coatings, and specialty resins.
